rows.label: qev085404_MSG0001
rows.name:
Gwin-senpai, everyone.
Thank you very much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085404_MSG0002
rows.name:
You're completely reckless.
For a non-combatant BLADE to
come to a place like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085404_MSG0005
rows.name:
Aisha, it's me! I've
come to pick you up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085404_MSG0008
rows.name: It looks like she's gotten wary of us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085404_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hey, does Aisha have a
favorite food or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085404_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ah, if that's the case, she has
a weakness for Kiran Catnip.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085404_MSG0012
rows.name:
The best way to catch something running
away is to lure it with food mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085404_MSG0013
rows.name:
Well, Nopon and cats do seem
to be on the same level.[ST:wait ]
